cases.prompt: 논문 작성 도와줘. IEEE 양식 LaTeX로, 수식이랑 BibTeX 인용까지.

assertions.text: Sets up a document class (e.g. IEEEtran) with sectioning and amsmath/amssymb math
Establishes a BibTeX or biblatex+biber citation workflow

cases.prompt: Get my paper ready for an arXiv submission with vector figures.

assertions.text: Exports vector figures from matplotlib/plotly as PDF/SVG
